ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "isd_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Independent School District (ISD) the school belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the school is located in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Current enrollment of the school */,
  "number_of_students_in_grade_9" INTEGER /* Number of students in grade 9 */,
  "number_of_students_in_grade_10" INTEGER /* Number of students in grade 10 */,
  "number_of_students_in_grade_11" INTEGER /* Number of students in grade 11 */,
  "number_of_students_in_grade_12" INTEGER /* Number of students in grade 12 */,
  "principal_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, charter, private) */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_isd_id FOREIGN KEY ("isd_id") REFERENCES independent_school_districts ("isd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "independent_school_districts" (
  "isd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISD */,
  "isd_name" TEXT /* Name of the ISD */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the ISD */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the ISD */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the ISD was founded */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the ISD */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the ISD */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_email" TEXT /* Email of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the superintendent */,
  "number_of_high_schools" INTEGER /* Number of high schools in the ISD */,
  "number_of_middle_schools" INTEGER /* Number of middle schools in the ISD */,
  "number_of_elementary_schools" INTEGER /* Number of elementary schools in the ISD */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff in the ISD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the region */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the region */,
  "number_of_high_schools" INTEGER /* Number of high schools in the region */,
  "number_of_middle_schools" INTEGER /* Number of middle schools in the region */,
  "number_of_elementary_schools" INTEGER /* Number of elementary schools in the region */,
  "average_student_population" INTEGER /* Average student population per school in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the school */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was calculated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was created */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., overall, academic, sports, arts) */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., state department, third-party organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., SAT scores, graduation rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., standardized test, graduation rate, dropout rate) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., state department, school report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school profile */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers */,
  "total_classrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of classrooms */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Enrollment capacity of the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "school_mission" TEXT /* Mission statement of the school */,
  "school_vision" TEXT /* Vision statement of the school */,
  "school_values" TEXT /* Core values of the school */,
  "school_motto" TEXT /* Motto of the school */,
  "school_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the school */,
  "school_mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the school */,
  "number_of_clubs" INTEGER /* Number of extracurricular clubs */,
  "number_of_sports_teams" INTEGER /* Number of sports teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_profiles_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., administrator, parent, student, teacher) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, reviewed, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
